goals.title: DAG Engine
goals.objective: Build task dependency resolution with DAG ordering, circular detection, and status propagation in flock-kernel

goals.title: Parallel Scheduler
goals.objective: Build parallel run scheduler that respects max_parallel_runs policy, manages agent allocation, and handles priority queuing

goals.title: Retry + Reviewer Engine
goals.objective: Build auto-retry with configurable policies and reviewer agent mode with multi-reviewer consensus

goals.title: Workflow Patterns
goals.objective: Implement multi-agent workflow patterns (sequential chain, parallel fan-out, fan-in) and integrate DAG + scheduler + retry into orchestrator

goals.title: CLI + API + Tests
goals.objective: Add CLI commands for dependencies/retry/reviewer, update API endpoints, write comprehensive tests for all Phase 3 features

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-dag-engine DAG Engine; G002-parallel-scheduler Parallel Scheduler; G003-retry-reviewer-engine Retry + Reviewer Engine; G004-workflow-patterns Workflow Patterns; G005-cli-api-tests CLI + API + Tests
